[ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: aml_bsa|product_iul|product_fia|product_gmwb|suitability|ethics|sales_practices|carrier_certification|dol_fiduciary|state_ce|finra_compliance — promote to reference product]']
  training_completion_date date [note: 'Date the producer successfully completed the training course.']
  training_cost_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Cost or fee paid for the training course in USD. Single-currency business operates in USD.']
  training_course_code varchar [note: 'Unique code identifying the training course or program.']
  training_course_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the training course or certification program.']
  training_delivery_method varchar [note: 'Method by which the training was delivered to the producer.']
  training_duration_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total duration of the training course in hours.']
  training_expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the training certification or credit expires and renewal or retaking is required.']
  training_notes varchar [note: 'Free-form notes or comments related to the producer\'s training record, including special circumstances or observations.']
  training_provider_code varchar [note: 'Unique code identifying the training provider or vendor.']
  training_start_date date [note: 'Date the producer began the training course.']
  training_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the producer\'s participation in the training course.']
  training_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the training program indicating whether it is mandatory, elective, certification-based, continuing education, product-specific, or compliance-related.']
  waiver_approval_date date [note: 'Date the training waiver was approved.']
  waiver_approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the person or authority who approved the training waiver.']
  waiver_granted_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether a waiver was granted exempting the producer from this training requirement.']
  waiver_reason varchar [note: 'Reason or justification for granting a training waiver to the producer.']

  Note: 'Records of mandatory and elective training completions for producers — including AML/BSA training, product-specific training (IUL, FIA, GMWB), suitability training, CE credits, and carrier-specific certification programs. Tracks course name, provider, completion date, score, CE credit hours awarded, expiration date, and compliance status. Supports DOL fiduciary training requirements and state CE mandates.'
}

Table agent.producer_product_auth {
  producer_product_auth_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the producer product authorization record.']
  appointment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to agent.appointment. Business justification: A producer product authorization (authorizing a producer to sell WL, UL, IUL, VUL, FIA, etc.) is typically granted in the context of a specific carrier appointment. Linking producer_product_auth to th']
  authorization_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to document.document. Business justification: Product authorization approvals generate regulatory documents (DOI filings, carrier authorization letters). Compliance audits require linking each producer_product_auth record to its supporting author']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Product authorizations are granted by a specific legal entity (carrier). Multi-entity carriers must track which entity authorized a producer to sell which products — required for commission accounting']
  plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.product_plan. Business justification: Producer product authorization requires linking to specific product plans for selling authority verification, commission schedule assignment, state-specific authorization validation, and compliance re']
  plan_version_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.plan_version. Business justification: Producer authorizations in life insurance are version-specific: a new plan version may carry different commission schedules, suitability requirements, or state approvals requiring re-authorization. Ca']
  producer_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the producer (agent, broker, BGA, MGA, GA) who is authorized to sell the product.']
  schedule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to commission.schedule. Business justification: Product authorization specifies which commission schedule applies for a producer/product combination, governing compensation when new business is submitted. Replacing the denormalized commission_sched']
  state_regulation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.state_regulation. Business justification: Producer product authorization is state-specific; state_regulation defines variable product registration requirements, suitability mandates, and restricted product rules per state. Compliance teams us']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the person or system that approved this product authorization.']
  authorization_approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the producer\'s authorization to sell this product was approved by the carrier.']
  authorization_effective_date date [note: 'The date on which the producer\'s authorization to sell this product becomes effective.']
  authorization_expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which the producer\'s authorization to sell this product expires. Null indicates no expiration (perpetual authorization).']
  authorization_notes varchar [note: 'Free-form notes regarding special conditions, restrictions, or comments related to this product authorization.']
  authorization_number varchar [note: 'Unique authorization number or certificate number issued for this producer-product authorization.']
  authorization_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the producer\'s authorization to sell this product. Active indicates full selling authority; pending indicates approval in progress; suspended indicates temporary restriction; revoked indicates permanent removal; expired indicates authorization lapsed; inactive indicates not currently authorized.']
  authorized_states varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of state codes where the producer is authorized to sell this product. Null if authorization applies to all states where producer is licensed.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this producer product authorization record was first created in the system.']
  finra_registration_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether FINRA registration is required to sell this product. True for variable products (VUL, variable annuities) that require securities licensing; False for traditional insurance products.']
  finra_series_license_required varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of FINRA series licenses required to sell this product (e.g., Series 6, Series 7, Series 63, Series 65). Null if no FINRA registration required.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this producer product authorization record was last updated in the system.']
  maximum_case_size_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Maximum policy face amount or premium amount that the producer is authorized to write for this product without special approval. Null if no maximum applies.']
  minimum_case_size_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Minimum policy face amount or premium amount that the producer is authorized to write for this product. Null if no minimum applies.']
  override_commission_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the producer is eligible to receive override commissions on downline sales of this product. True for producers with hierarchy management responsibilities (BGAs, MGAs, GAs); False for individual producers.']
  pos_system_integration_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this authorization is integrated with the Point of Sale system for real-time product availability filtering. True if POS integration active; False if manual authorization verification required.']
  renewal_reminder_sent_date date [note: 'The date on which a renewal reminder was sent to the producer for this product authorization. Used for tracking training renewal and authorization maintenance communications.']
  required_training_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the mandatory training program that must be completed before the producer can sell this product.']
  restricted_states varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of state codes where the producer is explicitly restricted from selling this product despite having a general license.']
  revocation_date date [note: 'The date on which the producer\'s authorization to sell this product was revoked. Null if authorization has not been revoked.']
  revocation_reason_code varchar [note: 'Code indicating the reason for authorization revocation (e.g., compliance violation, performance deficiency, voluntary surrender, license termination).']
  revocation_reason_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the reason for authorization revocation.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the source system from which this producer product authorization record originated (e.g., Sapiens Commission, Annocera, FAST).']
  state_specific_authorization_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this authorization is subject to state-specific restrictions or overrides. True if state-level authorization rules apply; False if authorization is uniform across all states.']
  suspension_end_date date [note: 'The date on which a temporary suspension of this product authorization is scheduled to end. Null if suspension is indefinite or authorization not suspended.']
  suspension_reason varchar [note: 'Description of the reason for temporary suspension of this product authorization (e.g., pending investigation, training renewal required, compliance review).']
  suspension_start_date date [note: 'The date on which a temporary suspension of this product authorization began. Null if authorization has not been suspended.']
  training_completion_date date [note: 'The date on which the producer completed the required training for this product authorization.']
  training_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status of the producer\'s training requirements for this product. Compliant indicates all training current; non-compliant indicates training deficiency; pending indicates training in progress; expired indicates certification lapsed.']
  training_expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which the producer\'s training certification expires and must be renewed to maintain authorization.']

  Note: 'Association table governing which specific insurance products (WL, UL, IUL, VUL, FIA, SPIA, DI, LTC) a producer is authorized to sell. Tracks product line authorization, authorization status, effective and expiration dates, required training completion, and state-specific authorization overrides. Prevents unauthorized product sales and supports POS system integration for product availability filtering.'
}

Table agent.production_activity {
  production_activity_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the production activity record. Primary key for this table.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Production activity drives commission expenses that must be allocated to cost centers for expense accrual, distribution channel profitability analysis, and variance reporting—enables matching commissi']
  hierarchy_node_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to agent.hierarchy_node. Business justification: Production activity records track sales production that rolls up through the distribution hierarchy. Adding hierarchy_node_id to production_activity enables direct attribution of production metrics to']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Production activity (premium volumes, policy counts, APE) must be attributed to a legal entity for statutory financial statements, RBC calculations, and GAAP/SAP reporting. Every production metric in ']
  plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.product_plan. Business justification: Production tracking by specific product plan enables accurate sales reporting, producer performance analysis by product, commission calculation, and product profitability analysis. Essential for sales']
  plan_version_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.plan_version. Business justification: When multiple plan versions are simultaneously active (inforce continuation on old version, new business on new version), actuarial and financial reporting must distinguish production by version for r']
  primary_production_producer_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the producer (agent, broker, BGA, MGA, GA) who generated this production activity.']
  activity_period_end_date date [note: 'The end date of the reporting period for this production activity record.']
  activity_period_start_date date [note: 'The start date of the reporting period for this production activity record (weekly, monthly, or quarterly).']
  activity_status varchar [note: 'Current status of this production activity record in the reporting workflow (draft, submitted, approved, or finalized).']
  annuity_count varchar [note: 'Number of annuity contracts issued during this period.']
  annuity_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium amount for annuity contracts issued during this period.']
  ape_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Annual Premium Equivalent representing the sum of regular annual premiums plus 10% of single premiums written during this period. Standard industry metric for measuring new business production.']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this production activity record was approved by management or compliance.']
  bonus_earned_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total bonus amount earned by the producer during this period for meeting production targets or incentive qualifications.']
  commission_earned_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total commission amount earned by the producer during this period based on production activity.']
  conservation_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Percentage of premium retained after accounting for lapses and surrenders. Measures the producers ability to conserve business.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this production activity record was first created in the system.']
  distribution_channel varchar [note: 'The distribution channel through which the producer operates (captive agent, independent agent, BGA, MGA, broker-dealer, bank channel, or direct). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: captive_agent|independent_agent|bga|mga|broker_dealer|bank_channel|direct — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  first_year_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total first-year premium amount for new business placed during this period.']
  hierarchy_level varchar [note: 'The producers position within the distribution hierarchy (producer, supervisor, manager, regional director, or national director).']
  issued_policy_count varchar [note: 'Total number of policies issued and placed by the producer during this period.']
  iul_count varchar [note: 'Number of indexed universal life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  iul_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium amount for indexed universal life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  lapse_count varchar [note: 'Number of policies that lapsed during this period from the producers book of business.']
  nigo_count varchar [note: 'Number of applications submitted that were Not In Good Order (incomplete or missing required information) during this period.']
  period_type varchar [note: 'The frequency or type of reporting period for this production activity (weekly, monthly, quarterly, or annual).']
  persistency_ratio decimal(5,4) [note: 'Ratio of policies remaining in force to total policies issued, measuring retention performance. Calculated as (policies in force / policies issued) for the producers book of business.']
  placement_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Ratio of issued policies to submitted applications, measuring the producers effectiveness in converting applications to issued policies.']
  renewal_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total renewal premium amount collected on existing policies serviced by the producer during this period.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the source system from which this production activity record originated (Policy Administration System or Agent and Commission Management System).']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this production activity record was submitted for approval or finalization.']
  submitted_application_count varchar [note: 'Total number of new business applications submitted by the producer during this period.']
  term_life_count varchar [note: 'Number of term life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  term_life_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium amount for term life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  total_face_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total death benefit face amount placed by the producer during this period across all issued policies.']
  total_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium amount collected or placed by the producer during this period across all products.']
  universal_life_count varchar [note: 'Number of universal life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  universal_life_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium amount for universal life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this production activity record was last modified or updated.']
  vul_count varchar [note: 'Number of variable universal life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  vul_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium amount for variable universal life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  whole_life_count varchar [note: 'Number of whole life insurance policies issued during this period.']
  whole_life_premium_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total premium amount for whole life insurance policies issued during this period.']

  Note: 'Periodic transactional records of producer sales production — new business submissions, placed policies, APE (Annual Premium Equivalent), face amount placed, product mix breakdown, and channel attribution. Each record represents a producer\'s activity for a defined period (weekly, monthly, quarterly). Captures submitted application count, issued policy count, placed premium, lapse count, persistency ratio, and conservation rate. Feeds channel performance dashboards, incentive qualification calculations, and management reporting. Sourced from Policy Administration System and Agent and Commission Management System.'
}

Table agent.agency {
  agency_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the agency legal entity in the distribution network.']
  contract_document_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to document.document. Business justification: Agency master agreements, amendments, and termination notices are legal documents requiring retention. Commission disputes, termination processing, and regulatory audits require access to executed age']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Agencies are organizational units that incur operating expenses (rent, staff, marketing) tracked in cost centers for agency-level P&L statements, overhead allocation, and distribution channel profitab']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Agencies operate under specific legal entities for regulatory licensing, statutory financial reporting, commission payment processing, and legal liability—required for state DOI filings, financial con']
  parent_agency_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent agency in multi-tier distribution hierarchies, enabling upline agency tracking for MGAs and BGAs.']
  schedule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to commission.schedule. Business justification: Agencies operate under specific commission schedules governing override and agency-level compensation. The denormalized commission_schedule_code on agency should be replaced with a FK to commission.sc']
  address_line_1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address line for the agency\'s principal place of business.']
  address_line_2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address line for suite, floor, or building information for the agency\'s principal place of business.']
  agency_code varchar [note: 'Carrier-assigned unique code for the agency used in policy administration and commission systems.']
  agency_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the agency entity: BGA (Brokerage General Agency), MGA (Managing General Agent), GA (General Agent), IMO (Independent Marketing Organization), NMO (National Marketing Organization), or Captive Agency.']
  annual_production_target decimal(15,2) [note: 'Target annual premium production amount (APE) set for the agency for the current calendar year.']
  appointment_date date [note: 'Date when the agency was first appointed by the carrier to sell insurance products.']
  appointment_status varchar [note: 'Current appointment status of the agency with the carrier for selling insurance products.']
  background_check_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent background check was completed for the agency.']
  background_check_status varchar [note: 'Status of the background check conducted on the agency\'s principal officer and key personnel.']
  broker_dealer_crd_number varchar [note: 'FINRA CRD number of the broker-dealer firm the agency is affiliated with for variable product distribution.']
  broker_dealer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the broker-dealer firm the agency is affiliated with for variable product sales, if applicable.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the agency\'s principal place of business is located.']
  contract_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the agency\'s distribution contract with the carrier became effective.']
  contract_number varchar [note: 'Unique contract number assigned to the agency\'s distribution agreement with the carrier.']
  contract_termination_date date [note: 'Date when the agency\'s distribution contract was terminated, if applicable.']
  contracting_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the agency\'s contracting relationship with the carrier.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the agency\'s principal place of business.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the agency record was first created in the system.']
  dba_name varchar [note: 'Trade name or DBA name under which the agency operates in the market, if different from legal name.']
  domicile_state varchar [note: 'Two-letter state code where the agency is legally domiciled and holds its primary business registration.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary business email address for agency communications and correspondence.']
  eo_coverage_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agency is required to maintain errors and omissions insurance coverage as a condition of appointment.']
  finra_registration_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agency must be FINRA-registered to sell variable life insurance and variable annuity products.']
  hierarchy_level varchar [note: 'Numeric level in the distribution hierarchy where 1 is top-level (e.g., NMO) and higher numbers represent downstream tiers.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the agency record was last updated in the system.']
  legal_name varchar [note: 'The official legal name of the agency as registered with state authorities and used in contracting.']
  lifetime_production_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total cumulative premium production amount (APE) generated by the agency since initial appointment.']
  lines_of_authority varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of insurance lines the agency is authorized to sell (e.g., Life, Annuity, Accident and Health, Variable Products).']
  onboarding_stage varchar [note: 'Current stage in the agency onboarding and credentialing process.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary business phone number for the agency.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'ZIP or ZIP+4 postal code for the agency\'s principal place of business.']
  principal_officer_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the principal officer or designated responsible party for the agency.']
  state_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter state code for the agency\'s principal place of business.']
  tax_identifier varchar [note: 'Federal Employer Identification Number (EIN) issued by the IRS for tax reporting and commission payment purposes.']
  termination_reason varchar [note: 'Detailed reason for contract termination, including voluntary termination, compliance violations, or business restructuring.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public website URL for the agency, if available.']
  ytd_production_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Cumulative premium production amount (APE) generated by the agency from beginning of year to current date.']

  Note: 'Master record for agency legal entities in the distribution network — BGAs (Brokerage General Agencies), MGAs (Managing General Agents), GAs (General Agents), IMOs (Independent Marketing Organizations), and NMOs (National Marketing Organizations). Captures agency legal name, DBA name, agency type classification, federal tax ID (EIN), principal officer, domicile state, contracting status with the carrier, channel type, appointment status, and parent organization for multi-tier agency structures. Distinct from individual producer records — agencies are legal entities that employ or contract with individual producers.'
}
